svg.text: Period-scan sensitivity: short tails miss the thin windows first
The logistic map does not just have period windows. It also has a cutoff story: a shallow scan understates the thin stable bands near chaos onset.
short scan = warmup 1200, keep 64; deep scan = warmup 3600, keep 512
deep scan recovers thin stable windows before the full-axis strip looks obviously different

text.tspan: orange above gray chaos = deeper patience recovered a stable window

svg.text: the deeper scan does not change the whole axis; it mainly rescues narrow stable bands

text.tspan: period shifts, not just chaos-vs-stable flips: 0
short tail = blue, deep tail = orange
